headline: Insulet Taps Mike Panos As CCO While Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Insulet (NasdaqGS:PODD) has appointed Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. Panos will lead global commercial operations and oversee international expansion of the Omnipod platform. The appointment is intended to support Insulet's global growth plans in the patch pump market. Insulet focuses on insulin delivery through its Omnipod platform, a tubeless patch pump used by people with diabetes. The appointment of a new commercial leader comes at a time when patch...
